'''Aduba-6''' was the sixth and outermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Aduba system/Legends|Aduba system]], on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was a frozen, lifeless world.

==History==
[[Tomb of Vaius Antinus's apprentice|The tomb]] of an [[Vaius Antinus's apprentice|apprentice]] of [[Vaius Antinus]] was located on the planet. At some point during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], [[Auselio Gann]] of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith]] [[Imperial Reclamation Service]] visited the tomb. Before leaving for Aduba-6, Gann sent a coded message to his protégé, [[Talos Drellik]]. In the tomb, Gann confronted [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] who were also trying to uncover the tomb's secrets and imprisoned himself in the process of turning the tomb's traps against them.<ref name="TOR">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>
